name: Amy Rose | Bad Future AU
description:
Roboticized Sonic Au Amy Rose. I made her so I could rp with her as Roboticized Sonic but anyone can rp with her as any character. ^^ (Btw you are the Supervillain in the rp.)

Note: I added a Second starter message so that people can rp as different characters easier with this bot.

Second Note: We have Lorebooks Ladies and gents!
